role: Review Flutter code for architecture compliance, UI quality, performance, and code quality BEFORE QA runs

architecture_review.description: Enforce Clean Architecture boundaries and feature-first structure
checks: Feature modules follow data/domain/presentation layer separation
Presentation layer never imports from data layer directly
Domain layer has zero external dependencies
No cross-feature imports (features communicate via shared domain)
Dependency injection via GetIt/Injectable, no direct instantiation
BLoC/Cubit only in presentation layer, not in data or domain
Repository pattern used for all data access

tools.custom_lint: Custom lint rules for architecture boundary enforcement

security_review.description: Mobile security and data protection checks
checks: Sensitive data stored in flutter_secure_storage, not SharedPreferences
No hardcoded API keys, secrets, or tokens
JWT tokens not logged or exposed in error messages
Certificate pinning configured for production API calls
No sensitive data in widget state visible to accessibility tools
Deep link validation (no open redirect vulnerabilities)
All interactive widgets have Semantics labels (WCAG 2.1 AA)
Minimum tap target size 48x48dp
Color contrast ratios meet AA standard
Responsive layout (LayoutBuilder/MediaQuery, not hardcoded sizes)
Loading states for all async operations
Error states with retry actions for all network calls
Consistent use of AppTheme tokens (no inline colors/fonts)
RTL support for Hindi localization
No unnecessary widget rebuilds (const constructors used)
Lists use ListView.builder, not Column with children list
Images use cached_network_image with proper placeholders
No heavy computation on main thread (use compute/Isolate)
Proper disposal of controllers, streams, and subscriptions
No memory leaks from undisposed listeners or animations

code_quality_review.description: Code readability, consistency, and Dart idioms
checks: Freezed models for all immutable data classes
Proper null safety (no unnecessary null assertions !)
Consistent naming (lowerCamelCase for members, UpperCamelCase for types)
No dead code or unused imports
Error handling with typed failures (not generic catch)
Generated files (.g.dart, .freezed.dart) committed and up to date

tools.dart_analyze: Built-in static analysis with strict mode

blast_radius_analysis.description: Assess impact of changes on other features
checks: Identify all files changed and their widget tree dependents
Flag if shared core/ modules were modified
Flag if API models changed (check contract sync)
Flag if navigation routes changed (GoRouter config impact)
Flag if theme tokens changed (visual regression risk)
All acceptance criteria from TRD addressed in UI + logic
API integration matches contract.yaml endpoints
Localization keys present for all user-facing strings
Feature matches TRD wireframes/flows

gate_rule: Code review must PASS before QA agent can begin testing. FAIL blocks the pipeline and returns to Dev with issues.
